## Scope

- [ ] Library API or component behavior
- [ ] Demo or CLI behavior
- [ ] Release/process/maintenance

## Review evidence

- [ ] I self-reviewed the diff.
- [ ] I ran the relevant local commands or explained why they are not needed.
- [ ] I asked Codex for a review pass when behavior, release, or security risk changed.
- [ ] User-facing docs or release notes are updated when behavior changed.

## Notes for reviewers

Link issues, package dry-run output, manual demo evidence, or Codex review notes here.
